case_title: SALEM THOMAS VS. JEANNE KWONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, SALEM AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG, JEANNE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, SALEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWONG, JEANNE BUTLER, COURTNEY $904.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.61 INTEREST, $428.70 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,433.31 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
